note: OWNER-RULED encoding 2026-07-20 (kit-audit Phase C; replaces the parser-baseline hypothesis). snow-white — BASE unit, AR/Iron/Attacker/B3; NOT snow-white-heavy-arms (SR/Water). She HAS board data: the 4 control-anchor comps (docs/probes/control/{sw,helm,lm,crown}; experiment C-SW/C-Helm/C-LM/C-Crown) — the plan doc's 'no-data' was stale. S1: every 30 normal-attack hits → 82.8% rider (crit-on default, no core, FB by timing) + self ATK 8.28% 5s — both kit-literal (hitCount 30; at AR 12 pulls/s ≈ every 2.5s while firing, so the ATK buff is near-permanent during sustained fire). S2a 144.73% 'enemies within range' → OWNER-RULED: fires on an INTERNAL COOLDOWN of 15s (trigger {kind:'interval', sec:15}); replaces the prior invented per-swap-shot trigger. ~12 procs/180s spread evenly, most OUTSIDE Full Burst (function-class flatDamage, crit-on default, +50% FB by landing timing only when a tick lands in an FB window). ⚑ first-fire phase (engine convention t=15s vs t=0 = ~1 proc) AND possible FB-scoping are both unmeasured — recipe: in sw.MP4 scan for 144.73%-class popups; confirm they appear OUTSIDE FB windows (falsifies FB-scoping) and time the first one (pins the phase). S2b crit +26.1% 10s → OWNER-RULED: gained on FULL-BURST ENTRY (trigger {kind:'fullBurstEnter'}, self); replaces the prior per-swap-shot+fbGate encoding. BURST weaponSwap charge cannon: damagePct 499.5, chargeTimeSec 5, durationSec 10. FULL-CHARGE DAMAGE — FOOTAGE-CONFIRMED ×10 (owner re-ruled 2026-07-20 from the sw.MP4 pass): 'Full Charge Damage 1000% of damage' is the full-charge MULTIPLIER (the in-game charge UI ramps to '1000%', exactly as an SR displays '250%'), so the full-charge coefficient = 499.5% × 10 = 4995% of ATK. Encoded chargeMultPct=1000 (Charge = chargeMult/100 = 10 at base per damage-calc §1d). The prior ADDITIVE reading (1499.5% via chargeMultPct 300.2002) is REFUTED: the six nuke popups sit ~3-4× above anything the 1499.5% class can produce and reconcile only with the ×10 class × FB × core × crit × live buffs. SWAP ECONOMY — OWNER-RULED: exactly 1 cannon shot per burst NO MATTER WHAT, then she RETURNS TO HER NORMAL GUN. Encoded maxShots:1 (governs the 1-shot cap; the swap terminates right after shot 1, and she resumes AR normals for the rest of the FB window). maxAmmo:1 stays as the swap weapon's magazine spec but maxShots is what caps her. ⚑ ENGINE ARTIFACT: the maxShots swap-end does NOT reset ammo (only time-expiry does), so she resumes AR at 0 ammo → a 111f reload before AR normals restart — recipe: does the AR resume firing immediately post-nuke in sw.MP4, or after a reload gap? PIERCE — OWNER-RULED: the swapped shot carries the Pierce tag (weaponSwap.hasPierce:true), so Pierce Damage ▲ buffs feed that shot's Damage-Up bucket while swapped; her AR normals are NOT pierce-tagged (the flag is swap-scoped, not top-level hasPierce). RESIDUAL: the pierce core+body double-hit stays UNMODELED (PIERCE_CORE_DOUBLE=false engine-wide, multipart-scope only) — inert on the partless boss. BOARD (this override — ×10 nuke + maxShots:1 + S2 15s interval): snow-white reads ~0.81–0.90 COLD across the 4 control comps (~347M), up from the pre-fix ×10-only baseline ~0.70 (299M) — the maxShots:1 post-shot AR resume + the 15s-interval S2a procs recover part of the gap. Still COLD because the sim loses ~5s of AR fire per burst window (she keeps firing her AR through the cannon charge in-game; see the ⚑ AR-during-charge gap below) — her likely remaining COLD driver. This override enacts the FAITHFUL kit, NOT a fit to the reals; the reading is recorded, not tuned. ⚑ cadence tuple: pullsPerSec 12 (AR class default), reloadFrames 111 (recipe: rounds/min + reload gap from any focus video). FB on the nuke: the swapped shot is category 'normal' → +50% by landing timing (in-FB), NOT the burst-cast pre-FB exemption (the cast only starts the swap; the shot lands ~5s later inside FB). ⚑⚑ FOOTAGE PASS 2026-07-20 (sw.MP4, 6 cannon windows read — MEASUREMENT, recorded not enacted): (1) the ADDITIVE ruling is CONTRADICTED by this recording on two independent axes — (a) the in-game charge readout ramps 929→966→'1000%' at the shot (the charge UI displays the full-charge MULTIPLIER, as an SR displays 250%), (b) the six nuke popups (50.5M/54.1M/45.1M/59.5M/59.5M/~45.1M, ALL labeled CORE HIT + PIERCE + crit-starburst, two exact repeats) sit at ~630 ATK-multiples vs sheet ATK — reconcilable with the ×10 4995% class × FB × core × crit × live buffs, but ~3-4× ABOVE anything the additive 1499.5% class can produce. RESOLVED 2026-07-20: owner re-ruled ×10 on this footage (chargeMultPct reverted 300.2002→1000); single-recording evidence, so a confirming second recording is still nice-to-have. (2) Swap-economy corroborated: exactly ONE cannon shot in every one of the 6 windows, at FB-entry+5.4-5.6s, then back to the AR ~1.5-2s later (not at window end) — maxShots:1 ✓ owner ruling ✓. (3) PIERCE tag on every cannon popup ✓ (hasPierce swap-scoped ✓). (4) NEW OBSERVED GAP: she KEEPS FIRING HER AR during the ~5s cannon charge (the cannon materializes only for the shot; the cast animation even precedes the FB banner by ~1-2s) — the engine's weaponSwap cannot fire the base weapon while a swap charge runs, so the sim loses ~5s of AR fire per burst window even with maxShots:1; candidate faithful re-encode = drop the weaponSwap and model the cannon as a delaySec≈5.5 charge-bucket hit while the AR keeps firing (needs an owner ruling on charge-buff composition). (5) Her B3 cadence: bursts every SECOND FB window (6 of 13), alternating with helm — matches the sim's B3 alternation.
caveats: skill2: the 144.73% damage line fires on a 15s internal cooldown (owner-ruled 2026-07-20); ⚑ first-fire phase (t=15 vs t=0) and whether the line is FB-scoped are unmeasured — recipe: scan sw.MP4 for 144.73%-class popups (appearance outside FB windows falsifies FB-scoping; first-popup time pins the phase)

burst: footage shows her AR KEEPS FIRING during the ~5s cannon charge (cannon materializes only for the shot) — inexpressible with weaponSwap, sim loses ~5s AR fire per window; likely her main residual COLD driver (⚑)

burst: exactly 1 cannon shot per burst then she resumes her AR (owner-ruled maxShots:1); ⚑ the swap-end does not reset ammo so AR resumes at 0 ammo → 111f reload first — recipe: does the AR resume firing immediately post-nuke in sw.MP4?
